title: stelis ophioglossoides
intro: Stelis ophioglossoides, also known as Adder's Tongue or Ophioglossum, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Stelis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis ophioglossoides include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
